subcodes.title: Words to Helen Goodall and Ella Cooper spoken in Jan. 1908
subcodes.first_line: The love shown by animals is instinctive and not dependent upon their own will--that is, they are endowed with their qualities and use them in a natural way
subcodes.subjects: @kindness to and rights of animals, @chastisement and requital, @free will and predestination; fate, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @the human soul
